title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.title: Tavuk Sis: Authentic Turkish Chicken Skewers Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Master authentic Tavuk Sis with our easy Turkish chicken skewers recipe! Juicy, flavorful chicken marinated and grilled to perfection. Get the full recipe here!
lowCompetitionKeywords: what to serve with Tavuk Sis
h2Headings: How to Make Tavuk Sis: Step-by-Step Guide
Frequently Asked Questions about Tavuk Sis
seo.imageAlt: Plate of grilled Tavuk Sis, authentic Turkish chicken skewers, with rice and salad.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy juicy, flavorful Tavuk Sis, a classic Turkish chicken skewer dish, perfect for grilling season!

description: Tavuk Sis are succulent Turkish chicken skewers, marinated in a flavorful blend of yogurt, olive oil, and aromatic spices, then grilled to perfection. This classic dish offers tender, juicy chicken with a slightly smoky char, embodying the vibrant flavors of Turkish cuisine. Perfect for a family meal or a summer barbecue, Tavuk Sis promises a delightful culinary experience.

ingredients.item: Boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Cut the chicken breast or thighs into uniform 1-inch cubes. This ensures even cooking. Place the chicken pieces into a large mixing bowl.

instructions.title: Make the Marinade
instructions.text: In a separate bowl, whisk together the plain yogurt, olive oil, tomato paste, minced garlic, dried oregano, ground cumin, sweet paprika, salt, and black pepper until well combined. This creates the signature flavorful Turkish marinade.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Pour the prepared marinade over the chicken cubes in the large mixing bowl. Toss thoroughly to ensure every piece of chicken is fully coated. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or ideally overnight, for best flavor.

instructions.title: Prepare Skewers and Vegetables
instructions.text: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent burning. If using metal skewers, no soaking is needed. If desired, cut the bell peppers and onion into 1-inch pieces, similar in size to the chicken.

instructions.title: Assemble the Skewers
instructions.text: Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the skewers, alternating with the optional bell pepper and onion pieces if using. Do not pack the chicken too tightly, leave a small space between pieces to allow for even cooking.

instructions.title: Grill or Broil the Skewers
instructions.text: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (about 400F / 200C) or preheat your oven broiler. Place the skewers on the hot grill or under the broiler. Cook for 15-20 minutes, turning every 4-5 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through, golden brown, and has nice char marks. Ensure internal temperature reaches 165F (74C).

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Once cooked, remove the Tavuk Sis from the grill or broiler and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving. This allows the juices to redistribute, keeping the chicken tender and moist. Serve hot with rice, pita bread, and a fresh salad.

tips: For the most tender Tavuk Sis, marinate the chicken for at least 4 hours or, even better, overnight in the refrigerator. The yogurt helps to tenderize the meat beautifully.
Do not overcrowd the skewers. Leaving a little space between the chicken and vegetable pieces ensures even cooking and allows for better charring, creating a more flavorful result.

Serve your Tavuk Sis immediately after resting with traditional accompaniments like bulgur pilav (Turkish cracked wheat pilaf), fresh shepherd's salad (çoban salatası), and warm lavash bread for an authentic Turkish dining experience.
article: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers is a beloved Turkish Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
